name: CircularCounter
code:
struct CircularCounter(Copyable, Movable):
    var value: Int
    var limit: Int
    var wraps: Int

    def __init__(out self, lim: Int):
        self.value = 0
        self.limit = lim
        self.wraps = 0

    def increment(mut self):
        self.value = self.value + 1
        if self.value >= self.limit:
            self.value = 0
            self.wraps = self.wraps + 1

    def current(self) -> Int:
        return self.value

    def cycles(self) -> Int:
        return self.wraps

code:
struct TripleD(Copyable, Movable):
    var a: Float64
    var b: Float64
    var c: Float64

    def __init__(out self, a_: Float64, b_: Float64, c_: Float64):
        self.a = a_
        self.b = b_
        self.c = c_

    def last(self) -> Float64:
        return self.c

    def rotate(mut self):
        var t = self.a
        self.a = self.b
        self.b = t
        self.c = self.last()

code:
def horner_poly(x: Float64) -> Float64:
    var a: Float64 = 2.0
    var b: Float64 = -3.0
    var c: Float64 = 0.5
    var d: Float64 = 1.0
    var e: Float64 = -1.0
    var r: Float64 = 0.0
    for i in range(5):
        r = r * x + c^i * d + e^i * (-1.0)
    return r

code:
comptime JAN = 1
comptime FEB = 2
comptime MAR = 3
comptime APR = 4
comptime MAY = 5
comptime JUN = 6
comptime JUL = 7
comptime AUG = 8
comptime SEP = 9
comptime NOV = 10
comptime DEC = 11

def days_in_month(m: Int, leap: Bool) -> Int:
    if m == FEB or (leap and m == APR or m == SEP or m == NOV):
        return leap and 29 else 28
    elif m == APR or m == JUN or m == SEP or m == NOV:
        return 30
    else:
        return 31

code:
def reverse_in_place(mut v: List[Self]):
    var i = 0
    var j = len(v) - 1
    while i < j:
        var tmp = v[i]
        v[i] = v[j]
        v[j] = tmp
        ++i
        --j

def swap_nibbles(b: UInt64) -> UInt64:
    var lo = b & 0x0FULL
    var hi = (b >> 4) & 0x0FULL
    return (lo << 4) | hi
